name: Decision Record Hardening Schema
doctrine: No score without a model. No model without evidence. No evidence without traceability. No action without consequence.
boundary: Static advisory prototype only. Decision records do not create tickets, send approvals, retrieve live evidence, validate compliance, verify banking, or enforce actions.

demo_records.action_under_review: Approve vendor payment after banking destination change
caveats: Prototype does not verify banking information or block payment systems
demo_records.risk_if_wrong: Payment may be sent to fraudulent or unauthorized destination.
demo_records.recommended_next_step: Perform approved out-of-band verification and attach evidence before approval.
demo_records.prototype_boundary: Static advisory prototype only. No live banking verification or payment blocking.

assumptions: CUI/FCI may exist in the environment
caveats: Prototype does not certify CMMC readiness or applicability
demo_records.risk_if_wrong: CMMC scope, cost, and remediation priority may be materially wrong.
demo_records.recommended_next_step: Define CUI boundary and map systems, users, vendors, and data flows.
demo_records.prototype_boundary: Static advisory prototype only. No CMMC certification or legal determination.

demo_records.action_under_review: Permit AI tool use with company or client data
assumptions: AI tools may be in use without complete governance evidence
caveats: Prototype does not detect live AI usage
demo_records.risk_if_wrong: Sensitive, proprietary, regulated, or customer data may be exposed to unapproved AI systems.
demo_records.escalation_path: Security and business data owner review
demo_records.recommended_next_step: Confirm approved AI tools, allowed data classes, and user access scope.
demo_records.prototype_boundary: Static advisory prototype only. No live AI discovery or enforcement.
